title: Pixel Q (Your Personal AI Agent)
description:
## Pixel Q вАФ A Truly Secure Local AI Butler

рЯ§Ц **One-time Purchase ¬Ј Perpetual Use ¬Ј Zero Subscription Fee**

рЯФТ **100% Local Operation ¬Ј Data Never Leaves Your Computer**

### рЯФР Permission Confirmation: AI Can Be Powerful, But It Cannot Overstep its Limits

Some AI tools on the market can directly control your computer without any braking mechanismвАФit's like a car without brakes; would you dare get in?

Pixel Q has a robust permission confirmation system built in from the ground up. Every high-risk operation requires your explicit consent:

рЯЦ±пЄП Controlling the mouse or keyboard вЖТ A pop-up request for authorization will appear first.

рЯФМ Shutting down/sleeping/restarting вЖТ Voice or pop-up confirmation required.

рЯМР Accessing websites not on the whitelist вЖТ A security warning will pop up, and you will have to decide.

рЯЫ°пЄП Terminating suspicious processes вЖТ Real-time alerts will be sent, and you will have to choose whether to handle them.

рЯТї Modifying program code вЖТ Secondary confirmation and automatic backup of the original file.

**You are not giving AI a blank check, but a authorization form that requires your signature to be effective.** **

---

### рЯІ† Five Local Models Working Together

All models run on your own computer, no internet connection required:

рЯТђ Everyday Conversation Model вЖТ Multilingual Communication

рЯІ© Deep Reasoning Model вЖТ Logic Analysis, Code Generation

вЪ° Lightweight Task Model вЖТ Quick and Simple Response

рЯСБпЄП Visual Model вЖТ Image Understanding and Description

рЯМР 18 interface languages вАЛвАЛ+ multiple voice synthesis languages вАЛвАЛвЖТ Interface and voice can be configured separately.

### рЯЦ•пЄП Your computer, it controls it for you.

рЯУВ Voice-activated programs вЖТ Say "Open Excel" to execute instantly.

рЯМР Browser control вЖТ Switch tabs, close tabs, search websites.

рЯФК Volume, window, system status вЖТ All can be controlled by voice or text.

### рЯУД Understand your documents, comprehend your images

рЯУО Drag and drop files for analysis вЖТ PDF, Word, Excel, PPT

### рЯУЕ Daily Proactive Reports on Itineraries and Emails

### рЯМР Safe Internet Access, Intelligent Search

рЯЫ°пЄП Whitelist Mechanism вЖТ Only allow access to websites you trust

### рЯО® It can act out any personality you want

### рЯУЪ Learning Mode

рЯОѓ Tell Pixel Q a learning goal

**Pixel Q isn't just a chatty toy; it's a disciplined, obedient, and capable personal AI assistant.**

**It works for you, it doesn't make decisions for you.**
description_short: Pixel Q is a fully local, oneвАСtime purchase AI assistant. Five specialized models for voice chat, PC control, file analysis and schedule management. No subscription. HighвАСrisk actions always require your permission. Your data never leaves your PC.
